====== H (10000) into Beryllium                 =======
        SRIM-2008.04
========================================
        Final ION DISTRIBUTION        
 This is a special 3-D array of 100x100 values.  
 These values can be used as input to other graphics software.
========================================
====== TRIM Calc.=  H(10 MeV) ==> Beryllium(  1 mm) ==========================
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--------------------------------------------------------------------
    Recoil/Damage Calculations made with Kinchin-Pease Estimates    
--------------------------------------------------------------------
 See file :  SRIM Outputs\TDATA.txt   for calculation data
 Ion    =  H   Energy = 10000 keV
============= TARGET MATERIAL ======================================
Layer 1 : Beryllium
Layer Width = 10000.E+03 A ;
  Layer # 1- Density = 12.34E22 atoms/cm3 = 1.848 g/cm3
  Layer # 1- Be = 100  Atomic Percent = 100  Mass Percent
====================================================================
 Total Ions calculated =005000.00
=============================================================================
       ION DISTRIBUTION Units are  >>>>  (Atoms/cm3)/(Atoms/cm2)  <<<<  
=============================================================================
             Below is an array of 10,000 values of final ION POSITIONS.
             The values form a 100x100 spatial array.
  TARGET     The depth values are in the first column, on the left.
  DEPTH      The grid of values are spaced at intervals of >>  1000 nm <<
  (Ang)      The Beam enters the target at column #50 of the top row.
----------- -------------------------------------------------------------------
